payload.description:
As a dashboard user, I want item identifiers in the items grid to show only the first identifier by default, so that the grid layout remains compact and readable.

Feature: Item grid identifier display

Scenario: Grid shows only first identifier until expanded elsewhere
  Given an item has multiple identifiers
  When the item is rendered in the items grid
  Then only the first identifier is shown
  And no expand control is shown in compact mode
payload.title: Fix identifier compact mode regression in items grid
